blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,618 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 42".
